name: IBM MTRAG-UN
capability_target: Multi-turn RAG memory under unanswerable, underspecified, non-standalone, and unclear-response pressure.

input_contract.metadata: official source card and challenge taxonomy
input_contract.context: private multi-turn RAG histories with answerability labels
input_contract.evidence: prior-turn bridge rows and answerability support
input_contract.memory_system: VCM and non-VCM baselines under equal context budgets

output_contract.residuals: false answer, underspecification miss, wrong turn bridge, or domain miss

smoke_steps: verify repository license and data terms
admit deterministic answerability scoring lanes only
contamination_policy: MTRAG-UN public conversations/corpora are calibration-only. Do not train on public turns, retrieved passages, answers, or task templates.
regression_policy: If mastered, keep private answerability rows as regression.

permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, and report writers

teacher_role: No teacher solving or LLM-as-judge substitution.
